steps.title: Apply growth percentages to get 2022 counts
steps.content:
To model the 2022 values, apply the growth percentages. A $p\%$ growth means multiplying by $1 + \frac{p}{100}$:
  • Advanced swimmers in 2022: $1.48a$ (grew by 48%)
  • Intermediate swimmers in 2022: $1.36b$ (grew by 36%)
  • Total swimmers in 2022: $40\times1.42$ (grew by 42%)

steps.title: Write the equation for 2022 totals
steps.content:
The 2022 total must equal the sum of 2022 advanced and intermediate:
$$1.48a + 1.36b = 40(1.42)$$That confirms C is correct.
